issues.description: The Step 6 instructions describe writing sN-verification.md but never mention persisting the structured issue list, so the machine-readable findings are dropped after the round completes.
issues.resolution_notes: Added the sN-issues.json write step to the Step 7 ISSUES_FOUND flow and the artifact table.

issues.description: The example fixture should prove that a minimal envelope without any resolution_* fields is still valid; the second issue below carries only the verifier-emitted fields.
